title: Tesla teases Cybercab with a built-in Starlink V5 antenna - Engadget
summary: Oddly, Starlink describes the V5 as having "home internet" capabilities only, unlike the Starlink Mini that's also designed for use "on the go." Another strange detail is that the few Tesla Cybercabs that exist operate only in cities, where 5G cellular networks…
